Metadata.homeTitle: JoinMyPDF — Free, Secure & Fast PDF Tools in Your Browser
Metadata.homeDescription: Convert, compress, and edit PDFs free and secure in your browser. No server uploads, full privacy, fast and unlimited. JoinMyPDF.
Metadata.siteTitle: JoinMyPDF — Free, Secure PDF Tools in Your Browser
Metadata.siteDescription: Convert, compress, split, and edit PDFs locally in your browser — free, secure, and fast. No server uploads, full privacy, and no limits.

Hero.headline: Seamless PDF tasks, right in your browser, running fully-locally.
Hero.subheadline: JoinMyPDF runs tools locally for maximum speed and absolute privacy.
Hero.defaultHeadline: Merge, compress, and edit PDFs in your browser—nothing is uploaded to our servers.
Hero.privateBody: Your documents never leave your device. Everything happens in your browser.
Hero.fastBody: No queues, no wait times. Files are handled instantly locally.
Hero.limitsBody: Enjoy standard downloads without watermarks or forced signups.

Home.pickToolDescription: Every workflow opens in one click—same layout, same privacy model.
Home.featuredToolsDescription: Start with the workflows people use most—merge, compress, convert, and secure PDFs in one click.
Home.browseAllToolsDescription: Full directory of merge, compress, convert, sign, and protect workflows—including long-tail pages for mobile, deadlines, and sensitive documents.
Home.guidesSectionDescription: Short tutorials that link straight into the tools so your team can repeat the same steps every time.
Home.headline: PDF Tools Suite
Home.subHeader: Fast, private PDF processing in your browser. Files never leave your device.
Home.minimalTagline: Fast, private, enterprise-grade processing in your browser. Compliance-focused.
Home.imageToolsDirectoryDescription: Resize, convert, crop, rotate, and compress images in your browser.
Home.faviconToolsDirectoryDescription: Generate favicons and convert between ICO, PNG, and SVG — all in your browser.
Home.marketingDescription: Upgrade your PDF! A professional, secure, and easy-to-use solution

imageTools.title: IMAGE PROCESSING TOOLS
imageTools.description: Resize, convert, crop, rotate, and compress images — all in your browser.

resizeImage.label: Resize Image
resizeImage.description: Change image dimensions by pixels or percentage while keeping quality sharp.

convertToPng.label: Convert to PNG
convertToPng.description: Turn JPG, WebP, or other formats into lossless PNG files instantly.

cropImage.label: Crop Image
cropImage.description: Trim borders and focus on the area you need with precise crop controls.

rotateImage.label: Rotate Image
rotateImage.description: Rotate photos 90°, 180°, or any angle and download the corrected file.

compressImage.label: Compress Image
compressImage.description: Reduce file size for email and web without visible quality loss.

heicToJpg.label: HEIC to JPG
heicToJpg.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to widely compatible JPG images.

faviconTools.title: FAVICON TOOLS
faviconTools.description: Generate favicons and convert icon formats — all in your browser.

generateFavicon.label: Generate Favicon
generateFavicon.description: Create favicon.ico and PNG sizes from any image — ready for your website.

pngToIco.label: PNG to ICO
pngToIco.description: Convert PNG images to Windows ICO format for legacy browser tabs.

icoToPng.label: ICO to PNG
icoToPng.description: Extract PNG images from ICO files for editing or modern web use.

svgToFavicon.label: SVG to Favicon
svgToFavicon.description: Rasterize SVG artwork into standard favicon sizes locally.

faviconPack.label: Favicon Pack
faviconPack.description: Export a full set of favicon sizes (16×16 through 512×512) in one ZIP.

appleTouchIcon.label: Apple Touch Icon
appleTouchIcon.description: Generate 180×180 Apple touch icons for iOS home-screen bookmarks.

faviconCompressor.label: Favicon Compressor
faviconCompressor.description: Shrink ICO, PNG, or JPG favicons locally—strip metadata and reduce file size.

faviconCropper.label: Favicon Cropper
faviconCropper.description: Crop PNG, JPG, or SVG artwork to a square favicon region in your browser.

transparentFavicon.label: Transparent Favicon
transparentFavicon.description: Click a background color to make it transparent and download a PNG favicon.

faviconCodeGenerator.label: Favicon Code Generator
faviconCodeGenerator.description: Generate standard HTML link tags for favicons, Apple Touch, Android, and manifest.

faviconPreviewer.label: Favicon Previewer
faviconPreviewer.description: Preview your favicon in browser tabs, bookmarks, and home-screen shortcuts.

textJsonTools.title: TEXT & JSON TOOLS
textJsonTools.description: Format and validate JSON locally — no uploads, no servers.

jsonFormatter.label: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Paste raw JSON, validate syntax, and copy a clean indented result.

jsonToCsv.label: JSON to CSV
jsonToCsv.description: Flatten nested JSON and export a standard CSV file with automatic headers.

jsonMinifier.label: JSON Minifier
jsonMinifier.description: Strip whitespace and compress JSON into a compact single-line format.

csvToJson.label: CSV to JSON
csvToJson.description: Parse CSV data and convert it into a JSON array of objects in your browser.

base64EncoderDecoder.label: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64EncoderDecoder.description: Encode text or files to Base64 and decode Base64 strings locally in your browser.

urlEncoderDecoder.label: URL Encoder/Decoder
urlEncoderDecoder.description: Encode and decode URL strings for query parameters, SEO, and safe data transfer.

textDiffChecker.label: Text Diff Checker
textDiffChecker.description: Compare two text versions side by side with clear additions and deletions.

stringGenerator.label: String Generator
stringGenerator.description: Generate secure random strings or UUID v4 values in batches — locally in your browser.

htmlMarkdownConverter.label: HTML/Markdown Converter
htmlMarkdownConverter.description: Convert Markdown to HTML or HTML back to Markdown in real time — entirely in your browser.

wordCharacterCounter.label: Word & Character Counter
wordCharacterCounter.description: Count characters, words, paragraphs, and reading time in real time — supports English and Hebrew.

userAgentParser.label: User Agent Parser
userAgentParser.description: Detect browser, OS, and device from any User-Agent string — parsed locally in your browser.

qrCodeGenerator.label: QR Code Generator
qrCodeGenerator.description: Create downloadable QR codes from URLs, text, or email — with size, error correction, and color options.

jwtDebugger.label: JWT Debugger
jwtDebugger.description: Decode JWT header, payload, and signature locally — with expiration insights and copy-friendly JSON.

yamlJsonConverter.label: YAML ↔ JSON
yamlJsonConverter.description: Convert YAML and JSON in both directions — parsed and formatted entirely in your browser.

csvToMarkdownTable.label: CSV to Markdown Table
csvToMarkdownTable.description: Turn comma-separated data into a clean Markdown table ready for docs and README files.

sqlQueryFormatter.label: SQL Query Formatter
sqlQueryFormatter.description: Beautify SQL with consistent indentation and keyword casing — no server upload required.

passwordGenerator.label: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Create strong random passwords with length and character-set controls — generated locally.

hashGenerator.label: Hash Generator
hashGenerator.description: Hash text or files with MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, or SHA-512 — computed in your browser.

uuidGenerator.label: UUID Generator
uuidGenerator.description: Generate UUID v1, v4, or v7 identifiers in bulk — cryptographically random, no upload.

unitConverter.label: Unit Converter
unitConverter.description: Convert weight, length, and area units instantly — handy for recipes, travel, and specs.

timezoneConverter.label: Timezone Converter
timezoneConverter.description: Compare world city clocks side by side — add or remove cities and reset anytime.

wordCharacterCounter.label: Word & Character Counter
wordCharacterCounter.description: Count characters, words, sentences, and paragraphs in real time — supports English and Hebrew.

Home.developerToolsDirectoryDescription: Parse user agents, debug JWTs, and generate QR codes — all processed locally in your browser.
Home.dataConversionToolsDirectoryDescription: Convert YAML, CSV, and SQL formats in your browser — private, fast, and server-free.
Home.securityToolsDirectoryDescription: Generate passwords, hashes, and UUIDs locally — nothing leaves your device.
Home.productivityToolsDirectoryDescription: Convert units, compare timezones, and count words — lightweight helpers in your browser.
Home.utilitiesDirectoryDescription: Favicon generators and text utilities — all processed locally in your browser.
Home.textJsonToolsDirectoryDescription: Format and validate JSON in your browser — private, fast, and server-free.

Favorites.metaDescription: Your saved PDF tools — stored locally in your browser, no account required.
Favorites.title: My favorites
Favorites.description: Tools you starred on the homepage. Saved only on this device.
Favorites.emptyState: No favorites yet. Explore our tools to get started.
Favorites.savedCount: {count, plural, one {# tool saved} other {# tools saved}}

Projects.metaDescription: Resume saved PDF tool sessions locally. Your projects stay on this device — no account required.
Projects.title: My Projects
Projects.description: Saved tool sessions on this device. Pick up merge, compress, and conversion workflows where you left off.
Projects.emptyState: Open any tool, add your files, and use Save Project to store the session locally for later.
Projects.savedCount: {count, plural, one {# project saved} other {# projects saved}}
Projects.modalHint: Stored only in this browser. Files never leave your device.

CookieConsent.title: Cookie preferences
CookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies for Google Analytics. To continue using our tools, you must accept our cookie policy.
CookieConsent.declineDenied: Access denied: You must accept the cookie policy to use this site.

ToolsDirectory.title: All PDF Tools
ToolsDirectory.description: {count}+ workflows for merge, compress, convert, sign, and protect—every tool runs locally in your browser. No uploads to our servers.
ToolsDirectory.startHereDescription: Popular merge, compress, convert, sign, and protect workflows.
ToolsDirectory.allToolsGridDescription: Browse all {count} tools in one grid—click any tile to open the workflow.
ToolsDirectory.whyLocalBody: Upload-based PDF sites copy your file to their servers. JoinMyPDF delivers JavaScript; your browser does the work. Open DevTools → Network and verify—your PDF never leaves your device.

PremiumTools.metaDescription: Sign, protect, redact, compare, and convert PDFs—plus invoice, timeline, and data studio apps. All run locally in your browser.
PremiumTools.title: Premium Tools

HeroDropzone.title: Drop PDFs here to merge
HeroDropzone.description: Your files open in the merge tool, ready to run—reorder pages, then download.

ScenarioWins.heading: Built for real workflows
ScenarioWins.subheading: Same tools—whether you are closing the month or shipping a client pack.
ScenarioWins.invoicesBody: Combine multiple PDFs, compress if your mailbox has a size cap, and send one attachment instead of ten.
ScenarioWins.legalBody: Assemble exhibits locally, split signed pages, and export only what reviewers need.
ScenarioWins.photosBody: Turn phone photos into a single ordered PDF for claims, inspections, or coursework—no desktop install.

SocialProof.body: Use JoinMyPDF in Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge—desktop or mobile—when you need reliable PDF utilities without routing files through a generic upload service.

Partners.mapDiagramBody: Creating a presentation or workflow? Build flowcharts & system designs visually with <brand>MapDiagram</brand>, then bring them here to merge.
Partners.wattQuickBody: Check out <brand>WattQuick</brand> — our free suite of auto loan trackers, debt calculators, and green home tools.

Footer.brandDescription: Merge, compress, convert, and secure PDFs in your browser. Files stay on your device—no uploads to our servers.

taglines.tools: JoinMyPDF — browser-based PDF tools with local processing.
taglines.blog: JoinMyPDF — guides for PDF workflows, email limits, and mobile tips.

Blog.metaDescription: Practical JoinMyPDF guides for merge, compress, split, and privacy-first PDF workflows—written for humans.
Blog.title: Latest Guides & Articles
Blog.description: Walkthroughs that link straight into the tools—built for real tasks like email limits, mobile workflows, and sensitive documents.

AdminInventory.metaDescription: Private master index of JoinMyPDF tools and articles.
AdminInventory.title: Site Inventory
AdminInventory.description: Auto-generated index of {items} tools and articles across {categories} categories.

DataTool.dropDescription: Drag and drop, or click to browse. Parsed entirely in your browser—nothing is uploaded.
DataTool.errorEmpty: No rows found in that file. Check the format and try again.
DataTool.clearedWorkspace: Cleared workspace. Upload a new file or load demo data.

StudioTools.invoiceTemplateLoaded: Template loaded for {slug} — edit any field before you download.
StudioTools.timelineTemplateLoaded: Template loaded for {slug} — edit any task or date before you download.
StudioTools.previewNotReady: Preview is not ready. Try again in a moment.

CropImage.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
CropImage.dropHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC — processed locally in your browser.
CropImage.selectFileAria: Select an image file to crop
CropImage.cropInstructions: Drag the frame to move it. Pull corners or edges to resize the crop area.
CropImage.invalidFile: Please choose a supported image file.

ResizeImage.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
ResizeImage.dropHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC — processed locally in your browser.
ResizeImage.selectFileAria: Select an image file to resize
ResizeImage.resizeInstructions: Set the output width and height in pixels. Lock aspect ratio to scale proportionally.
ResizeImage.invalidFile: Please choose a supported image file.
ResizeImage.invalidDimensions: Enter valid width and height values.

ConvertToPng.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
ConvertToPng.dropHint: JPG, WebP, HEIC, GIF — converted locally to PNG in your browser.
ConvertToPng.selectFileAria: Select an image file to convert to PNG
ConvertToPng.convertInstructions: Preview your image, then export a high-quality PNG file.
ConvertToPng.invalidFile: Please choose a supported image file.

RotateImage.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
RotateImage.dropHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC — rotated locally in your browser.
RotateImage.selectFileAria: Select an image file to rotate
RotateImage.rotateInstructions: Use the rotate buttons to adjust orientation, then download.
RotateImage.invalidFile: Please choose a supported image file.

CompressImage.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
CompressImage.dropHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC — compressed locally in your browser.
CompressImage.selectFileAria: Select an image file to compress
CompressImage.compressInstructions: Adjust quality, compare file sizes, then download the compressed image.
CompressImage.invalidFile: Please choose a supported image file.

GenerateFavicon.instructions: Enter 1–2 characters, pick colors, and preview your favicon in real time. Everything runs locally in your browser.
GenerateFavicon.textHint: One or two characters work best for small tab icons.
GenerateFavicon.emptyTextError: Enter at least one character before downloading.

PngToIco.dropTitle: Drop a PNG here or click to browse
PngToIco.dropHint: PNG files only — converted locally to ICO in your browser.
PngToIco.selectFileAria: Select a PNG file to convert to ICO
PngToIco.convertInstructions: Preview your PNG, check the 32×32 favicon preview, then download a multi-size ICO file.
PngToIco.invalidFile: Please choose a valid PNG file.
PngToIco.convertFailed: Could not convert this PNG. Try another file or a smaller image.

IcoToPng.dropTitle: Drop an ICO here or click to browse
IcoToPng.dropHint: ICO files only — decoded locally in your browser.
IcoToPng.selectFileAria: Select an ICO file to convert to PNG
IcoToPng.convertInstructions: Choose which embedded icon size to export, preview it, then download a PNG.
IcoToPng.invalidFile: Please choose a valid ICO file.
IcoToPng.convertFailed: Could not read this ICO file. Try another file.

SvgToFavicon.dropTitle: Drop an SVG here or click to browse
SvgToFavicon.dropHint: SVG files only — rasterized locally into a favicon ICO in your browser.
SvgToFavicon.selectFileAria: Select an SVG file to convert to favicon
SvgToFavicon.convertInstructions: Preview your vector logo, choose an output size, check the favicon preview, then download an ICO file.
SvgToFavicon.invalidFile: Please choose a valid SVG file.
SvgToFavicon.convertFailed: Could not render this SVG. Try a simpler file or check the markup.

FaviconPack.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
FaviconPack.dropHint: PNG or JPG — a complete favicon ZIP is built locally in your browser.
FaviconPack.selectFileAria: Select a PNG or JPG to build a favicon pack
FaviconPack.convertInstructions: Preview your source image, review the files included in the pack, then download one ZIP.
FaviconPack.invalidFile: Please choose a PNG or JPG file.
FaviconPack.convertFailed: Could not build the favicon pack. Try a smaller or simpler image.

AppleTouchIcon.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
AppleTouchIcon.dropHint: PNG or JPG — Apple touch icons are rendered locally in your browser.
AppleTouchIcon.selectFileAria: Select a PNG or JPG to generate an Apple touch icon
AppleTouchIcon.convertInstructions: Choose icon sizes and background, preview on an iOS-style tile, then download.
AppleTouchIcon.invalidFile: Please choose a PNG or JPG file.
AppleTouchIcon.convertFailed: Could not generate the Apple touch icon. Try a smaller or simpler image.

FaviconCompressor.dropTitle: Drop a favicon here or click to browse
FaviconCompressor.dropHint: ICO, PNG, or JPG — optimization runs locally in your browser.
FaviconCompressor.selectFileAria: Select an ICO, PNG, or JPG favicon to compress
FaviconCompressor.compressInstructions: Preview your favicon, compare file sizes, then download the optimized version.
FaviconCompressor.invalidFile: Please choose an ICO, PNG, or JPG favicon file.
FaviconCompressor.optimizeFailed: Could not optimize this favicon. Try a different file.

FaviconCropper.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
FaviconCropper.dropHint: PNG, JPG, or SVG — square cropping runs locally in your browser.
FaviconCropper.selectFileAria: Select a PNG, JPG, or SVG to crop for a favicon
FaviconCropper.cropInstructions: Drag the square crop area to frame your icon, choose an output size, then download.
FaviconCropper.invalidFile: Please choose a PNG, JPG, or SVG file.

TransparentFavicon.dropTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
TransparentFavicon.dropHint: PNG or JPG — transparency is applied locally in your browser.
TransparentFavicon.selectFileAria: Select a PNG or JPG to make a transparent favicon
TransparentFavicon.pickInstructions: Click the background color in your image to make it transparent.
TransparentFavicon.invalidFile: Please choose a PNG or JPG file.
TransparentFavicon.exportFailed: Could not export the transparent favicon. Try a different image.

FaviconCodeGenerator.instructions: Enter the path to your hosted favicon file. The HTML snippet updates instantly with every standard link tag.
FaviconCodeGenerator.pathHint: Use a site-relative path such as /favicon.ico or /assets/favicon.png. Companion files are assumed to live in the same folder.
FaviconCodeGenerator.copyFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard. Select the code and copy manually.

FaviconPreviewer.dropTitle: Drop a favicon here or click to browse
FaviconPreviewer.dropHint: PNG, JPG, ICO, or SVG — preview runs locally in your browser.
FaviconPreviewer.selectFileAria: Select a favicon file to preview
FaviconPreviewer.previewInstructions: Adjust the page title and UI theme to see how your favicon looks in common contexts.
FaviconPreviewer.invalidFile: Please choose a PNG, JPG, ICO, or SVG favicon file.
FaviconPreviewer.invalidUrl: Could not load that favicon URL. Check the address or upload the file instead.
